stations.name: Closest stations are Cannon Hill and Coorparoo

buses.note: Bus routes serve Carina via Old Cleveland Road and Creek Road.

driving.motorway_access: M3 corridor for southern travel. Story Bridge for the CBD.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 13 to 17 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Carina has the Pacific Golf Club precinct nearby. Westfield Carindale is a short drive for big-format retail and dining. Camp Hill Marketplace handles village dining within a 5 to 10 minute drive.

pockets.name: Whites Hill catchment streets
pockets.character: Streets within the Whites Hill State College catchment. Premium family pocket.

pockets.name: Pacific Golf Club area
pockets.character: Established residential streets with character home stock.

buyer_profile.note: Buyers targeting the Whites Hill catchment and the family-suburb feel.
Buyers priced out of Camp Hill or Coorparoo who want similar family-suburb access at a more accessible price.
Character home stock attracts buyers looking for renovation projects.
